children.text: Monies received by Attending Physician from sale of prescription drugs or other sources; deposit of receipts

children.tail: , the Office of the Attending Physician Revolving Fund established by the first undesignated paragraph under the center heading “

children.text: Office of the Attending Physician Revolving Fund
children.tail: ” in title III of the Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1976 (

) is abolished and all monies in the Fund on such date or subsequently received by the Attending Physician from the sale of prescription drugs or from any other source shall be deposited in the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.

], referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.

children.text: Section is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1990, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1990.
